name: Ouster OS1 — Mid-Range Lidar
description: Digital lidar with 5.2M points/sec, 240m range, 360° FOV. 447g, IP68/IP69K rated. REV7 sensor with up to 128 channels. NDAA compliant, US manufactured. Standard for UAS mapping and autonomous navigation.

name: Ouster OS0 — Short-Range Wide-FOV Lidar
description: Ultra-wide 90° vertical FOV lidar optimized for close-range perception and robotics. Same digital architecture as OS1. Ideal for obstacle avoidance and indoor navigation on UAS.

name: Ouster OS2 — Long-Range Lidar
description: Long-range variant optimized for 200+ meter detection. Narrow vertical FOV focused on distant object detection. Suited for infrastructure inspection, corridor mapping, and perimeter security from UAS.

name: RIEGL miniVUX-1UAV — Survey-Grade Airborne Lidar
description: Survey-grade airborne laser scanner at 1.55 kg. 100 kHz pulse rate, 330m range, eye-safe Class 1. Designed for UAV-based topographic mapping with centimeter accuracy. Austrian manufacture, NATO-aligned.

name: RIEGL VUX-120²³ — High-Performance Airborne Scanner
description: High-performance airborne laser scanner at 2 kg with 1.8 MHz effective measurement rate, 720m operating altitude, 10mm accuracy. Multi-target echo processing. Professional survey and mapping standard.

name: YellowScan Voyager — Integrated Lidar+INS
description: Integrated lidar mapping solution combining RIEGL scanner with INS and processing software. 2M usable points/sec, 1cm accuracy. Turnkey solution for professional UAV surveying.

name: Livox Mid-360 — Budget Lidar
description: Budget 360° lidar at only 265g and $600-900. Non-repetitive scanning pattern provides high point density over time. Strong price-to-performance ratio but Chinese manufacture — NOT NDAA compliant.

name: Ainstein US-D1 — Radar Altimeter
description: 24 GHz radar altimeter with 50m range, ±6cm accuracy, 100 Hz update rate. 110g, IP67. UART/CAN interface. NDAA compliant, ITAR-free. Standard radar altimeter for ArduPilot/PX4 platforms. US manufactured.

name: Echodyne EchoGuard — Metamaterial ESA Radar
description: Metamaterial electronically scanned array (ESA) radar that detects DJI Phantom-4 class drones at ~1 km and vehicles at 3.5 km. 1.25 kg, 120°x80° FOV, under 50W. No mechanical scanning parts. NDAA compliant. Used for airspace awareness and counter-UAS detection.

name: Echodyne EchoGuard CR — 360° Radar
description: 360° coverage variant of EchoGuard using multiple metamaterial ESA panels. Provides full-hemisphere drone detection and tracking for persistent airspace monitoring.

name: Advanced Navigation Motus — MEMS IMU
description: Breakthrough MEMS IMU achieving 0.2°/hr gyro bias instability — approaching FOG-grade performance from MEMS technology. Only 26g. Massive cost and weight reduction vs fiber-optic gyros for defense-grade navigation.

name: SBG Systems Quanta Micro — Tactical INS
description: Compact tactical-grade INS at approximately 50g with 0.8°/hr gyro bias. Integrates GNSS receiver for full navigation solution. French manufacture — EU/NATO sovereign supply chain.

name: SBG Systems Pulse-40 — Ultra-Miniature INS
description: Ultra-miniature tactical-grade INS at only 12g and 0.3W. Designed for micro-UAS and precision-guided munitions where SWaP is extreme. Includes GNSS and dual-antenna heading.

name: SBG Systems Ellipse-D — Dual-Antenna INS/GNSS
description: Dual-antenna RTK INS/GNSS providing centimeter-level positioning and precise heading without magnetometer. Standard for UAS survey and mapping applications. French manufacture.

name: VectorNav VN-100 — AHRS/IMU
description: Compact AHRS/IMU with under 10°/hr gyro bias in under 30g package. Industry standard for commercial UAS attitude reference. US manufactured, NDAA compliant.

name: VectorNav VN-200 — GPS/INS
description: Integrated GPS/INS module providing position, velocity, and attitude. Kalman filter fuses MEMS IMU with GNSS. Mid-range solution between VN-100 AHRS and VN-300 dual-antenna.

name: VectorNav VN-300 — Dual-Antenna GPS/INS
description: Dual-antenna GPS/INS providing precise heading and position without magnetometer. Highest-performance VectorNav solution for UAS and autonomous systems.

name: Inertial Labs INS-D/P — Defense INS
description: Defense-grade INS systems for UAS platforms. INS-D for dual-antenna heading, INS-P for precision navigation. US manufactured with NDAA compliance. Supports PX4/ArduPilot integration.

name: ARK Electronics Flow MR — Optical Flow Sensor
description: Mid-range optical flow sensor for GPS-denied positioning. Blue UAS Framework listed. MEMS IMU integrated (Analog Devices/Murata). Made in USA. Provides visual odometry for indoor and GNSS-denied flight.

name: KVH 1750 IMU — FOG
description: Fiber-optic gyro IMU with under 0.05°/hr bias instability. Gold standard for high-accuracy navigation in defense UAS. Significantly heavier and more expensive than MEMS but provides gyro performance 10-100x better.

name: MicaSense RedEdge-P — Multispectral Camera
description: 5-band multispectral camera plus 5.1 MP panchromatic for UAS precision agriculture and environmental monitoring. 300g. NDAA compliant, DIU approved. Industry standard for agricultural remote sensing.

name: MicaSense Altum-PT — Multispectral + Thermal
description: Combined multispectral (5 bands) plus 320x256 thermal sensor for simultaneous crop stress and temperature mapping. Adds FLIR thermal to RedEdge capabilities. NDAA compliant.

name: Sentera 6X — Multi-Sensor Camera
description: 6-sensor payload with 5x 3.2 MP multispectral cameras plus 20 MP RGB plus optional FLIR Boson thermal. 290g. NDAA compliant, DIU approved. Designed for precision agriculture and defense ISR on small UAS.
